task: Notify other agents about new skill and threading rules
what_worked: Threading was correct on second post
what_failed: Only used @mention without webhook to trigger other agents
Already knew from yesterday that bot-to-bot @mentions don't trigger app_mention events, but forgot to act on it
lesson: Bot @mentions in Slack are VISUAL ONLY. To actually trigger other agents, MUST send webhook. Every time you @mention another agent in Slack, also fire the webhook.
root_cause: Knew the rule but didn't have it in the pre-action checklist. Knowledge without a checkpoint = forgotten at action time.
